subcodes.first_line: O Thou Speaking Book! Make mention of him who hath believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, when most of His servants turned away from Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کتاب الناطق ان اذکر من آمن بالله رب العالمین اذ اعرض عنه اکثر العباد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
